qas.a: personnel identifying, reporting and correcting hazards promptly and efficiently.

AF Form 457

Commanders must ensure an AF Form 457, USAF Hazard Report (HR), or equivalent product is readily available to all personnel.

Any person assigned, attached or under contract to the Air Force may report a hazard.

Reports can be submitted anonymously

qas.q: If the hazard presents critical/imminent danger, the supervisor or individual responsible for that area will _______________________________________________________________________.
qas.a: take immediate action to mitigate or eliminate the hazard to protect personnel or property.

qas.q: Who will determine the appropriate safety, fire, or health discipline to investigate the HR?
qas.a: The Chief of Safety, in consultation with his staff.

qas.q: When will the assigned investigator will investigate the HR for critical/imminent danger situations?
When will the assigned investigator will investigate the HR for potentially serious situations?
When will the assigned investigator will investigate the HR for lesser conditions?
The responsible individual completes Part II, "Action Taken," within __ working days and returns the HR to the safety office for monitoring.
The investigator informs the originator, (if known), about the completed action within __ workdays after the report is closed.
Transient personnel unable to report a hazard at a base where it is found should _________________________________________________.
qas.a: submit the HR to the next Air Force base they visit, or to the safety office at their home base.

qas.q: Persons identifying hazards involving weather forecasting must ____________________________________________________________________________.
qas.a: submit hazard reports as soon as possible to ensure that records are not destroyed.

qas.q: Installation safety staffs send hazard reports that involve other military services, foreign nations or other agencies outside the Air Force to __________________.
qas.a:
HQ AFSEC/SE

(Air Force Safety Center, Kirtland NM)

qas.q: Higher level appeals must be addressed promptly and a reply sent to the employee within __ calendar days.
qas.a:
20

If a reply is not received within 20 calendar days or if the employee is dissatisfied with the reply, they may appeal to the next higher level.
